name: API Data Leakage Detection
description: Detects and responds to API data leakage incidents where API endpoints return excessive data, expose sensitive fields, or exhibit anomalous response patterns. Riggs AI analyzes the alert to determine if the API is leaking sensitive data beyond its intended scope. Confirmed leaks trigger API rate limiting or blocking, security team notification, and a remediation ticket for the API development team. Includes an approval gate for blocking production API endpoints.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation ticket for API development team to fix data leakage

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify API security team and SOC of data leakage incident

data.title: API Data Leakage Alert
data.summary: Triggers on API monitoring alerts for excessive response data or sensitive field exposure

data.title: AI API Data Leak Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI analyzes API response patterns, data sensitivity, and caller context

config.custom_instructions: Analyze the API endpoint response for sensitive data exposure. Check response size against baseline, identify PII or credential fields in responses, evaluate caller authentication and authorization, and determine if this is a misconfigured endpoint or active exploitation.

data.title: Data Leakage Confirmed?
data.summary: Branch based on whether API data leakage is confirmed

data.title: Active Exploitation?
data.summary: Determine if the API leak is being actively exploited vs misconfigured

data.title: Approve API Endpoint Blocking
data.summary: Requires approval before blocking a production API endpoint

data.title: Block API Endpoint
data.summary: Apply rate limiting or block the leaking API endpoint

params.reason: Active data leakage exploitation — endpoint blocked pending remediation

data.summary: Apply aggressive rate limiting to the misconfigured API endpoint

params.reason: API data leakage detected — rate limiting applied pending fix

data.title: Create API Remediation Ticket

config.title: API Data Leakage: {{$.trigger.alert.api_endpoint}} — Sensitive fields exposed
